description: Product Description Brut Splash-On Aftershave Lotion is an icon in beard and face care for men. This product is developed to soothe the skin after shaving and reduce irritation. The masculine fragrance is unique and persistent, with notes of sandalwood and musk mixing to create an iconic aroma. Brut Splash-On After Shave Lotion is formulated with high quality ingredients to provide maximum skin care. This product contains a mixture of moisturizing ingredients that help nourish and protect the skin of the face.In addition, Brut Splash-On After Shave Lotion also contains an antibacterial agent that helps prevent skin infections. Formulation : Top notes: Bergamot, Lavender, Anise, Basil, Orange blossoms Heart Notes: Geranium, Jasmine, Ylang-ylang Base Notes: Sandalwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Oak Moss, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Size: 200 ml... Directions Apply the lotion gently to the skin
